_comment: QuickCharge AC charging receipts at Lakeville Residence (Malaysia, RM/MYR ~1.00/kWh). Transcribed from the in-app 'Charging Receipt' cards. 'date' is the LOCAL (UTC+8) date the charge STARTED (used to match the car's sessions that day); 'usageKwh' is the grid-side meter energy (receipt 'Usage' Wh / 1000); 'spent' is the authoritative RM cost. The importer (pnpm import:quickcharge) matches each receipt to the car's charge_session(s) on that local date and applies the authoritative cost (split proportionally when the plug-in was recorded as several sessions). To add a new receipt, append a row here and re-run the importer (idempotent). Keep one receipt per local date — two receipts on the same date are routed to review, not auto-applied. The 18-Jun-2026 screenshot has no receipt number and is omitted to avoid colliding with live polling.
